string.text: The Rhino revolvers, manufactured by the Italian company Armi Chiappa, are distinguished by a revolutionary patented design and construction, with an unusual barrel arrangement for revolvers opposite the lower drum chamber.\n This model is the pocket sized 20DS with a 2 inch barrel, chambered in 9x19mm.\n

The Rhino revolvers, manufactured by the Italian company Armi Chiappa, are distinguished by a revolutionary patented design and construction, with an unusual barrel arrangement for revolvers opposite the lower drum chamber.\n This model is the 50DS with a 5 inch barrel, chambered in .357.\n
